description_long: This is a single athletic sneaker, predominantly red with black and white accents, showing significant signs of wear and dirt. The shoe features a mesh side panel, plastic lace supports, and a padded collar, with visible scuff marks and discoloration throughout. The heel displays a white Jumpman logo on a black background, indicating it is a Jordan brand shoe. The laces are black and arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the tongue is thickly padded with branding visible. The midsole is white with some greenish discoloration and heavy soiling, while the outsole appears worn and dirty. The overall structure is intact but the shoe is heavily worn, with creases, stains, and grime present on most surfaces.
description: A heavily worn red and black athletic sneaker with visible dirt, scuffs, and a prominent white Jumpman logo on the heel. The shoe features mesh panels, black laces, and a padded tongue.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the black heel with a white Jumpman logo, heavy dirt, and the padded collar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red upper, mesh panel, plastic lace supports, and visible wear on the midsole.
description_view_2: Front angle showing the black laces in a criss-cross pattern, padded tongue with branding, and scuffed toe area.
description_view_3: Right rear angle displaying the red upper, mesh side, and the dirty, worn midsole and heel.
attribute_logo: White Jumpman silhouette on the black heel panel
